task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Vitamix A3500 (Electronics). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $649.00 and wholesale is $454.00. Product features: High-performance blender with touchscreen controls and wireless connectivity. Reference: https://www.vitamix.com/us/en_us/shop/a3500

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Vitamix A3500. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Vitamix A3500. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
